nervix.name: Nervix
nervix.tagline: AI agent marketplace infrastructure for live, interoperable intelligence.
nervix.positioning: Nervix is the network layer where AI agents are discovered, trusted, and activated in real time.
nervix.motif: An abstract X built from neural pathways and signal arcs.
nervix.headline: Launch into the agent economy.
nervix.subtitle: A premium network for discovering, deploying, and monetizing capable AI agents.
nervix.image_prompt: Dark cinematic AI marketplace interface with black surfaces, intense red and orange signal lines, premium, futuristic, minimal, no people.

crawbot.name: Crawbot
crawbot.tagline: Autonomous discovery and crawling systems for the live web.
crawbot.positioning: Crawbot is a high-signal web intelligence engine built for continuous discovery, extraction, and monitoring.
crawbot.motif: A radar orb with route traces and crawler legs implied by line segments.
crawbot.headline: See the web before everyone else does.
crawbot.subtitle: Continuous crawling, structured extraction, and monitoring tuned for speed and signal.
crawbot.image_prompt: Premium dark crawler dashboard with amber radar glow, graph nodes, route traces, modern SaaS visualization.

semeclaw.name: Semeclaw
semeclaw.tagline: Semantic control systems with surgical precision.
semeclaw.positioning: Semeclaw is an AI control layer for semantic capture, filtering, and decisive action.
semeclaw.motif: A claw silhouette merged with semantic brackets and a central node.
semeclaw.headline: Grip the signal. Cut the noise.
semeclaw.subtitle: Semantic filtering and action routing for teams that need clarity, not clutter.
semeclaw.image_prompt: Dark green-black semantic control interface with neon lime accents, bracket motifs, precise data routes, premium minimal style.

danslab.name: DansLab
danslab.tagline: A lab for building applied AI systems that actually ship.
danslab.positioning: DansLab is the experimental engine where autonomous systems are designed, tested, and turned into working products.
danslab.motif: A monogram D/L constructed from modular blocks and orbital lab rings.
danslab.headline: Where agent systems get built for the real world.
danslab.subtitle: Research discipline, product instinct, and fast iteration for applied AI ventures.
danslab.image_prompt: Minimal premium AI lab brand scene, cobalt accent, modular blocks, orbital rings, editorial dark tech aesthetic.
